subcodes.first_line: O Thou Benevolent God! Grant us a shelter in Thy threshold and inform us of Thy mysteries! Make our eyes seeing and our ears hearing!
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @The Holy Spirit, @prayer for nearness to God, @living waters; water of life
